---
title: "PCA plots"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: united
    toc: yes
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
---


```{r}

rm(list=ls())

```


```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(rtracklayer)
library(tidyverse)
library(DiffBind)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(UpSetR)
```



```{r}

load("/data/gpfs/projects/punim2745/03.CUTRUN_normalisation_KA/ER_dataset/3.realign_to_human_yeast/R_analysis/2.Diffbind/data/diffbind_analyse_workspace_2v2.RData")

```


```{r}
dbObj_counts_summit %>% dba.plotPCA()
```


```{r}
dbObj_RLEbackground %>% dba.plotPCA()
dbObj_RLERiP %>% dba.plotPCA()
dbObj_RPKMnorm %>% dba.plotPCA()
dbObj_sacCer3norm %>% dba.plotPCA()
dbObj_dm6norm %>% dba.plotPCA()
dbObj_greenlist %>% dba.plotPCA()
```
